docket_entries.description: ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PRROF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,691.89 FILED BY PANOSSIAN, ABRAHAM AS TO DEFENDANT DVORAK, SAE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUTOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ABRAHAM PANOSSIAN. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SAE DVORAK. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-20-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-23-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUN-15-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER. NO APPEARANCES ARE MADE. (506)
